topics.name: చెమ్మచెక్క
topics.summary: This topic introduces the traditional Telugu clapping game song "Chemmachekka". Students are encouraged to listen, sing, and speak about the song, which is a common children's folk game.

topics.name: తప్పెట్లోయ్ తాళోయ్
topics.summary: This topic introduces a children's song or poem titled "తప్పెట్లోయ్ తాళోయ్" (Drum and Cymbals). The poem describes a temple, offerings for God (fruits, flowers), and treats for children (jaggery and puffed rice). The page encourages students to listen, sing, and speak the poem, followed by oral comprehension questions.

topics.name: పలకరింపు
topics.summary: This topic introduces students to the concept of greeting others, emphasizing the importance of a positive and kind approach through a visual scene, a poem, and discussion questions. The activities encourage students to listen, sing, and speak about greetings.

topics.name: పదాలు
topics.summary: This topic introduces students to three short Telugu verses, focusing on themes of nature (butterflies), moral values (good deeds), and the importance of time and education. It encourages listening, singing, and speaking activities.

topics.name: వర్ణమాల
topics.summary: This topic introduces the Telugu alphabet, including vowels (అచ్చులు) and consonants (హల్లులు), and provides exercises for recognizing and writing them.

topics.name: సరళ పదాల పరిచయం
topics.summary: Students are introduced to simple Telugu words through pictures and practice reading and speaking them.

topics.name: పద గుర్తింపు మరియు అక్షర వర్గీకరణ
topics.summary: Students practice recognizing words, matching them to pictures, reading lists of words, and identifying specific letters within words.

topics.name: సరళ పదాలు రాయడం
topics.summary: Students practice writing simple Telugu words, both by naming pictures and by forming words from a given set of letters.

topics.name: గుణింతపు గుర్తులు పరిచయం
topics.summary: This topic introduces students to Telugu vowel signs (Gunintalu) by associating them with words and pictures, and provides practice in writing vowelized consonants.

topics.name: గుణింత పదాలు పరిచయం
topics.summary: Students are introduced to Guniṃta words, learning to read and identify words formed using various vowel signs with different consonants. They also practice writing new Guniṃta words and identifying Guniṃtākṣarālu from given words.

topics.name: వాక్యాలు మరియు పేరా చదవడం
topics.summary: Students practice reading comprehension by evaluating sentences for truthfulness and answering questions based on a short paragraph.

topics.name: పదాలు మరియు వాక్యాలు రాయడం
topics.summary: Students practice writing by naming pictures and constructing sentences based on a table.

topics.name: ఒత్తులు పరిచయం
topics.summary: This topic introduces students to various 'ottulu' (conjunct consonants) in Telugu by presenting words with associated pictures, highlighting the specific 'ottu' character, and its English phonetic representation.

topics.name: కుక్కలు - కీ
topics.summary: Students are introduced to the 'క్క' sound and its usage through a poem, reading exercises, and writing practice. They learn about Dvitvaksharalu (double letters) and Samyuktaksharalu (conjuncts of different consonants).

topics.name: మగ్గలు - (గ్గ)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the concept of 'muggu' (rangoli) and related vocabulary, focusing on words containing the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant. Students listen to and discuss questions about rangoli and the accompanying image.

topics.name: గ్గ అక్షర పదాలు చదవడం
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading and identifying words containing the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant, distinguishing it from similar sounds, and practicing pronunciation.

topics.name: గ్గ అక్షర పదాలు రాయడం
topics.summary: This topic focuses on writing words and sentences using the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant, practicing its 'gunintha' forms, and identifying objects by writing their names.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: This topic encourages creative expression through matching words to form sentences and drawing/coloring a rangoli.

topics.name: 3. పిచ్చుక - (చ్ఛ)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'చ్ఛ' conjunct consonant through a poem about a sparrow and its nest, followed by oral discussion questions about birds and their nesting habits.

topics.name: చదవండి
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading exercises, including identifying 'guṇintam' and 'samyuktākṣaram' in sentences, differentiating between words with and without conjunct consonants, and categorizing words into 'dvitvākṣaram' and 'samyuktākṣaram'.

topics.name: రాయండి
topics.summary: This topic includes writing exercises such as identifying and underlining words with the 'చ్ఛ' conjunct consonant in sentences, practicing writing the 'చ్ఛ' forms of letters, and writing the names of objects shown in pictures.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: This topic encourages creative writing by asking students to continue a given poem about seasons.

topics.name: బుజ్జిమేక (గేయం)
topics.summary: This topic introduces a short poem or song about a small goat (బుజ్జిమేక) and its activities, focusing on words with the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster.

topics.name: చదవండి
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading practice, including identifying specific sentences in the poem, recognizing differences in words, and distinguishing words with and without the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster. It also includes a sentence formation exercise.

topics.name: రాయండి
topics.summary: This topic provides various writing exercises, including practicing the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster, completing sentences based on pictures, forming words from a letter grid, and constructing sentences from a word table.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: This topic encourages creative expression through reading, singing, and writing a short poem.

topics.name: 5. చెట్టు - (ట్ట)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'ట్ట' (ṭṭa) consonant cluster. It includes a short story/poem, reading exercises to differentiate between 'ట' and 'ట్ట', vocabulary building with 'ట్ట' words, writing practice for the 'ట్ట' guṇintaṃ, sentence construction, and a creative drawing activity.

topics.name: 6. బుడ్డోడు - (ఢ్ఢ)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'ఢ్ఢ' consonant cluster through a short story/poem about a boy named Buddodu who falls while running for a laddu. It includes an oral discussion activity related to the story.

topics.name: చదవండి
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading and comprehension skills, including identifying words and sentences, distinguishing between similar-sounding letters, and filling in blanks with appropriate vocabulary.

topics.name: రాయండి
topics.summary: This topic focuses on writing skills, including matching pictures to words, practicing the 'ఢ' gunintha with its vattu, writing words with consonant clusters, and forming new words from a letter grid.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: This topic encourages creative expression through writing and singing activities, including naming pictures, forming sentences, and reciting a song.

topics.name: బత్తాయి పండు గేయం
topics.summary: Students read and discuss a poem about the sweet lime fruit, focusing on its characteristics and health benefits.

topics.name: 'త్త' ఒత్తు పదాలు
topics.summary: Students practice reading and identifying words containing the 'త్త' consonant cluster (vattu).

topics.name: రాయడం
topics.summary: Students practice writing the 'త్త' consonant cluster in gunintha form, writing names for pictures, forming words from a grid, and matching words to write sentences.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: Students engage in a creative writing activity by completing a poem about fruits.

topics.name: 8) ఎద్దుల బండి - ద్ద
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant through a poem about a bullock cart and includes listening and speaking activities related to the theme.

topics.name: చదవండి (Read)
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading and identifying words containing the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant through various exercises, including underlining, differentiating sounds, categorizing, and filling in blanks.

topics.name: రాయండి (Write)
topics.summary: This topic provides various writing exercises, including tracing and copying the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant with vowel signs, writing names of pictures, and dictation practice.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత (Creativity)
topics.summary: This topic includes a creative activity where students color a picture and write sentences about it.

topics.name: చిన్నారిపాపాయి
topics.summary: A poem/song about a little baby, introducing and practicing words with the 'న్న' (nna) sound/ottu.

topics.name: కప్ప - (ప్పు)
topics.summary: Introduction to the 'ప్పు' sound and words, featuring a poem and illustration about frogs.

topics.name: 'ప్పు' అక్షరమున్న పదాలు చదవండి
topics.summary: Reading and identification exercises focusing on words containing the 'ప్పు' consonant cluster.

topics.name: 'ప్పు' పదాలతో రాయండి
topics.summary: Writing exercises including true/false, odd one out, and word formation using 'ప్పు' words.

topics.name: వాక్యాలు రాయండి మరియు సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: Exercises involving sentence writing based on pictures, word categorization, and a creative drawing/writing activity.

topics.name: మబ్బులు - బ్భు
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'బ్భు' vottu (conjunct consonant) through a poem about clouds and rain, followed by reading and writing exercises focusing on words containing this vottu. It also includes creative activities.

topics.name: 12. భలేబొమ్మ - (మ్మ)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'మ్మ' consonant cluster through a poem about a doll and includes oral discussion questions related to dolls and drawing.

topics.name: చదవండి
topics.summary: This topic contains reading exercises focused on identifying words, distinguishing between similar-sounding words, circling specific consonant clusters, and filling in blanks.

topics.name: రాయండి
topics.summary: This topic focuses on writing skills, including practicing the 'మ్మ' gunintha, naming objects from pictures, forming words from a letter grid, and constructing sentences.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
topics.summary: This topic includes a creative art activity where students color a picture and name it.

topics.name: బియ్యం కథ మరియు 'య్య' పరిచయం
topics.summary: This topic introduces the conjunct consonant 'య్య' through a short story about rice and includes oral discussion questions.

topics.name: 'య్య' అక్షర పఠనం మరియు గుర్తింపు
topics.summary: This topic focuses on reading words containing the 'య్య' conjunct consonant and identifying it within words.

topics.name: 'య్య' అక్షర రచన మరియు వాక్య నిర్మాణం
topics.summary: This topic focuses on writing the 'య్య' conjunct, completing sentences based on visual cues, forming words from a grid, and constructing meaningful phrases or sentences.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మక రచన
topics.summary: This topic encourages creative writing through the completion of a poem.

topics.name: గుర్రం - గుర్రం గేయం మరియు సంభాషణ
topics.summary: Introduction to the horse, a poem about a horse, and speaking exercises related to speed and songs.

topics.name: 'ర' మరియు '్ర' అక్షరాల గుర్తింపు
topics.summary: Exercises for identifying the letter 'ర' and the '్ర' consonant cluster in words and sentences.

topics.name: '్ర' ఒత్తుతో పద నిర్మాణం, వాక్యాలు మరియు చిత్రాల పేర్లు
topics.summary: Writing exercises involving adding the '్ర' consonant cluster to letters, forming sentences using given words, and identifying pictures.

topics.name: చిత్రాల పేర్లు మరియు సృజనాత్మక గేయం
topics.summary: Continuation of picture naming and a creative activity involving reading, singing, and writing a poem/song.

topics.name: 15. పిల్లం - (ల్ల)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the conjunct consonant 'ల్ల' (lla) through a poem, followed by reading, writing, and creative exercises focusing on words containing 'ల్ల'.

topics.name: 16. ముద్ద - (వ)
topics.summary: This chapter introduces students to the 'వ' consonant cluster (వ ఒత్తు) in Telugu. It includes a poem, reading exercises, word identification, writing practice, and creative activities focused on words containing the 'వ' ఒత్తు.

topics.name: 17. ఇంద్రధనుస్సు
topics.summary: This topic introduces the Telugu poem "ఇంద్రధనుస్సు" (Rainbow) and includes various reading, writing, listening, and creative activities related to the poem and Telugu language skills, focusing on vowel marks and word recognition.

topics.name: పొడుపు కథలు పరిచయం
topics.summary: Students are introduced to various riddles with accompanying images and their implied answers.

topics.name: పొడుపు కథలు - వినండి, మాట్లాడండి, చదవండి
topics.summary: Students practice listening, speaking, and reading riddles, including answering them and matching them to images.

topics.name: పొడుపు కథలు - రాయండి, పదజాలం
topics.summary: Students reflect on the importance of riddles, practice sentence formation with new vocabulary, and identify words from riddles to compose new ones.

topics.name: సృజనాత్మకత - పొడుపు కథలు రాయండి
topics.summary: Students engage in creative writing by composing their own riddles based on provided images.

topics.name: ఆవు - పులి (కథ)
topics.summary: This topic covers the story of a cow and a tiger, focusing on honesty and compassion, followed by comprehension, vocabulary, and creative writing exercises based on the story.

topics.name: సహాయం
topics.summary: This topic presents a short picture story about a rabbit and a monkey, illustrating the theme of helping friends.

topics.name: చిట్టి మొక్క
topics.summary: A poem titled "చిట్టి మొక్క" (Little Plant) describing the process of planting a sapling, its growth, and the benefits of trees.

topics.name: అభ్యాసాలు
topics.summary: Exercises related to the "చిట్టి మొక్క" poem, including listening, speaking, reading comprehension, writing, vocabulary, and creative activities.

topics.name: సంపాదకులు మరియు చిత్రకారులు
topics.summary: Lists of contributors to the textbook, including editors, advisors, subject experts, writers, illustrators, and layout designers.

topics.name: నోట్స్
topics.summary: A dedicated page for students to write notes, practice writing, or complete activities related to the chapter.

subtopics.name: చెమ్మచెక్క పాట
subtopics.summary: The lyrics of the traditional Telugu clapping game song "Chemmachekka" are presented for students to read and learn.

subtopics.name: తప్పెట్లోయ్ తాళోయ్
subtopics.summary: Students read and recite the poem "తప్పెట్లోయ్ తాళోయ్".

subtopics.name: పలకరింపు దృశ్యం
subtopics.summary: An illustration depicting two families, including children, greeting each other and exchanging items, visually introducing the concept of salutation and social interaction.

subtopics.name: పలకరింపు గేయం
subtopics.summary: A short poem that teaches students the importance of greeting others with a cheerful heart and a smile, and how doing so earns respect from many people. This poem is intended for listening, singing, and speaking aloud.

subtopics.name: మేడిపండు చూడు మేలిమియుండు
subtopics.summary: A verse describing a cocoon transforming into butterflies, emphasizing inner beauty and transformation.

subtopics.name: ఎప్పటి కెయ్యది ప్రస్తుత
subtopics.summary: A verse advising students to always do good deeds and avoid bad company, conveying a moral lesson.

subtopics.name: గడిచిపోయినట్టి క్షణము తిరిగిరాదు
subtopics.summary: A verse highlighting the irreversible nature of time and the importance of valuing education and knowledge.

subtopics.name: అచ్చులు పరిచయం
subtopics.summary: Introduction and recognition of Telugu vowels.

subtopics.name: హల్లులు పరిచయం
subtopics.summary: Introduction and recognition of Telugu consonants.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాల గుర్తింపు
subtopics.summary: Practice recognizing specific categories of letters within the alphabet based on color coding and identifying differences between similar-looking letters.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాల లేఖనం
subtopics.summary: Practice writing individual letters to complete sequences and identifying initial letters of words from pictures.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మలతో సరళ పదాలు చదవడం, మాట్లాడటం
subtopics.summary: Students identify and pronounce simple Telugu words by looking at corresponding pictures.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మలకు పదాలు జతపరచడం
subtopics.summary: Students match given pictures to their corresponding words.

subtopics.name: పదాలు చదవడం మరియు అక్షరాలను వర్గాలలో రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read a set of words and then extract and categorize the individual letters from those words.

subtopics.name: పదాల జాబితా చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students practice reading a comprehensive list of simple Telugu words.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాల పునరావృత్తి గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students identify the letter that appears most frequently in a given list of words.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write the names of objects depicted in pictures.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాలతో పదాలు తయారుచేయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read a grid of letters and form new words using those letters, then write them down.

subtopics.name: గుణింతపు గుర్తుల గుర్తింపు
subtopics.summary: Students learn to identify and recognize individual vowel signs by observing their usage in words presented with corresponding pictures.

subtopics.name: గుణింతాల రచన అభ్యాసం
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing consonants combined with all the different vowel signs to form complete Gunintalu.

subtopics.name: గుణింత పదాలు చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read Guniṃta words presented in a table, organized by vowel sign and consonant, and are prompted to write five additional Guniṃta words.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మలు - గుణింత పదాలు
subtopics.summary: Students identify objects from pictures and read their corresponding names, which are Guniṃta words.

subtopics.name: గుణింతాక్షరాలను గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students extract Guniṃtākṣarālu (letters with vowel signs) from given words and categorize them into a table based on their vowel sign.

subtopics.name: వాక్యాలను చదివి గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students read given sentences and mark them as true (✓) or false (X).

subtopics.name: పేరా చదివి ప్రశ్నలకు జవాబులు
subtopics.summary: Students read a short paragraph and answer comprehension questions based on its content.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write the names of various objects depicted in pictures.

subtopics.name: పట్టిక ఆధారంగా వాక్యాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students construct grammatically correct sentences by combining words and phrases from a given table.

subtopics.name: ఒత్తుల గుర్తింపు
subtopics.summary: Students learn to identify different 'ottulu' (conjunct consonants) within Telugu words through visual and textual examples.

subtopics.name: చుక్కలు (Stars) - పద్యం, చర్చ
subtopics.summary: Students recite a poem about stars and discuss their observations and thoughts about them.

subtopics.name: 'క్క' అక్షర పదాలు చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read words containing the 'క్క' conjunct and identify the difference between single 'క' and double 'క్క' sounds and letters.

subtopics.name: ద్విత్వాక్షరాలు, సంయుక్తాక్షరాలు పరిచయం
subtopics.summary: Students learn the definitions and see examples of Dvitvaksharalu (double letters, where a consonant is combined with its own subscript form) and Samyuktaksharalu (conjuncts of different consonants, where a consonant is combined with the subscript form of another consonant).

subtopics.name: ద్విత్వాక్షరాలు, సంయుక్తాక్షరాలు గుర్తించి రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students identify and categorize words containing Dvitvaksharalu and Samyuktaksharalu from a given list and write them into a table.

subtopics.name: 'క్క' గుణింతం రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'క్క' consonant with various vowel signs (Gunintam).

subtopics.name: 'క్క' పదాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write names for pictures and form new words using given letters, focusing on words that include 'క్క'.

subtopics.name: చందమామ, చుక్కలకు రంగులు వేయండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in a creative activity by coloring a picture of the moon and stars.

subtopics.name: మగ్గులు పదజాలం
subtopics.summary: Students are introduced to various descriptive words and phrases related to 'muggu' (rangoli), such as 'colorful rangoli', 'beautiful rangoli', and 'rangoli in front of the house'.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in listening and speaking activities by answering questions about when rangoli are drawn and identifying elements in the provided picture.

subtopics.name: గ్గ అక్షర గుర్తింపు
subtopics.summary: Students identify and underline the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant within given words.

subtopics.name: గ్గ ఒత్తు పదాలు చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read words containing the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant and identify them within a list, as well as words with 'n' stress as specified in the instruction.

subtopics.name: గ్గ అక్షర భేదం
subtopics.summary: Students learn to differentiate between words with and without the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant by reading them clearly and identifying the sound difference.

subtopics.name: ఖాళీలు పూరించండి
subtopics.summary: Students fill in the blanks in sentences using appropriate words containing the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: గ్గ గుణింతం రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'gunintha' (vowel-modified) forms of the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students identify and write the names of objects shown in pictures, many of which contain the 'గ్గ' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: పదాలు జతపరచండి, వాక్యాలు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students match words from two columns to form meaningful phrases or sentences and then write complete sentences using these pairs.

subtopics.name: ముగ్గు గీయండి, రంగులు వేయండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in an art activity by drawing and coloring a rangoli design of their choice.

subtopics.name: పిచ్చుక కవిత
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem about a sparrow building its nest.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion about sparrows, other birds, and how they build nests.

subtopics.name: గుణింతం, సంయుక్తాక్షరం గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read sentences and identify 'guṇintam' and 'samyuktākṣaram' elements, underlining sentences and circling specific words.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాల మధ్య తేడాను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words and identify the difference in the underlined letters, practicing pronunciation.

subtopics.name: ద్విత్వాక్షరాలు, సంయుక్తాక్షరాలు పట్టికలో రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students read a list of words and categorize them into 'dvitvākṣaram' (double consonant) and 'samyuktākṣaram' (conjunct consonant) in a table.

subtopics.name: 'చ్ఛ' ఒత్తు పదాల కింద గీత గీయండి
subtopics.summary: Students read sentences and underline words containing the 'చ్ఛ' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: 'చ్ఛ' ఒత్తు చేర్చి రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'చ్ఛ' conjunct consonant by adding it to various letters in a grid.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students identify objects from pictures and write their names in Telugu.

subtopics.name: సొంతంగా పాడినించి రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in creative writing by completing a poem about the seasons.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి
subtopics.summary: Students listen to the poem and engage in oral discussion by answering questions related to the goat's actions and sharing names of children's games they know.

subtopics.name: గేయంలో వాక్యాలను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students are asked to identify a specific sentence from the previously introduced poem.

subtopics.name: పదాలను చదవండి - తేడాను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words and are instructed to identify any differences. The provided pairs are identical, suggesting a focus on careful reading or a conceptual difference.

subtopics.name: 'ట్ట' ఒత్తులేని 'ట' ఒత్తున్న పదం
subtopics.summary: Students read a list of words fluently and identify the word that contains the 'ట' sound but does not have the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster.

subtopics.name: పదాలు జతపరిచి వాక్యాలు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students match sentence fragments from two columns to form complete and meaningful sentences.

subtopics.name: 'ట్ట' ఒత్తు చేర్చి రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students read individual 'ట' letters and then practice writing the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster in a designated grid.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మలతో వాక్యాలు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students observe pictures, read incomplete sentences, and complete them by inserting the word represented by the picture to form full sentences.

subtopics.name: గళ్ళలోని అక్షరాలతో పదాలను రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students are given a grid of letters and are tasked with forming as many words as possible using those letters.

subtopics.name: పట్టిక ఆధారంగా వాక్యాలు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students construct grammatically correct and meaningful sentences by selecting one word from each column of a provided table.

subtopics.name: గేయాన్ని చదవండి. పాడించి రాయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem, are encouraged to sing it, and then write it down, fostering both literacy and creative skills.

subtopics.name: చిటికి ఆకలివేసింది
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem/story about a tree and picking fruits, which introduces words with the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion about fruits they know and their favorite fruits.

subtopics.name: గేయంలో వాక్యాలను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students identify and underline specific sentences within the previously read poem/story.

subtopics.name: పదాలలో తేడాను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words to identify and pronounce the difference between words with single 'ట' and those with the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster.

subtopics.name: వత్తులతో పదాలు చదవండి
subtopics.summary: Students read a list of words containing the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster to improve fluency and recognition.

subtopics.name: పదాల వర్గీకరణ
subtopics.summary: Students classify words based on whether the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster is formed with 'ట' or another letter, filling in a table.

subtopics.name: గుణింతం రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'ట్ట' guṇintaṃ (vowel signs combined with the 'ట్ట' consonant cluster) in a grid.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students identify and write the names of objects shown in pictures.

subtopics.name: వాక్యాలను రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students construct sentences using words provided in a table.

subtopics.name: పండ్ల చెట్టు బొమ్మ గీయండి
subtopics.summary: Students draw and color a picture of a fruit tree they like, fostering creativity.

subtopics.name: బుడ్డోడమ్మా బుడ్డోడు
subtopics.summary: A short story/poem about a boy named Buddodu who falls while trying to get a laddu.

subtopics.name: కింది పదాలు, వాక్యాలు గట్టియెలో గుర్తించండి. పదాలకు 'O' చుట్టండి. వాక్యాల కింద గీత గీయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students identify words and sentences from the story, circling words and underlining sentences.

subtopics.name: కింది పదాలను చదవండి. గీతగీసిన అక్షరాల మధ్య తేడాను గుర్తించండి. వాటిని స్పష్టంగా పలకండి.
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words, identify the phonetic difference between underlined letters (likely 'డ' and 'ఢ'), and practice clear pronunciation.

subtopics.name: కింది ఖాళీలను సరైన పదాలతో పూరించండి. చదువండి.
subtopics.summary: Students fill in the blanks in sentences using words from a provided word bank, reinforcing vocabulary and comprehension.

subtopics.name: కింది బొమ్మలకు సరియైన పదాలతో జతపరచండి.
subtopics.summary: Students match given pictures (egg, grass, cloth, laddu) with their corresponding Telugu words.

subtopics.name: కింది గుణింతాన్ని చదువండి. కింది గడిలో 'ఢ' ఒత్తు చేర్చి రాయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students read the 'ఢ' gunintha (vowel signs with the consonant) and practice writing it by adding the 'ఢ' vattu (consonant cluster) in a provided grid.

subtopics.name: ఖాళీలు ఒత్తు పదాలు రాయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students write words containing consonant clusters (vattu words) in the provided blank spaces.

subtopics.name: కింది గళ్ళలోని అక్షరాలతో కొత్త పదాలు రాయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students form and write new words using a selection of letters provided in a grid.

subtopics.name: కింది బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి. వాటితో వాక్యాలు రాయండి.
subtopics.summary: Students write the names of given pictures (laddu, grass, hammer) and then construct sentences using those words.

subtopics.name: కింది గేయాన్ని పాడించండి.
subtopics.summary: Students are instructed to sing a short song/poem about a cow needing grass, promoting oral recitation and rhythm.

subtopics.name: గేయం పఠనం
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem about the sweet lime fruit.

subtopics.name: వాక్యాలను చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read sentences and identify their corresponding numbers based on meaning.

subtopics.name: 'త్త' ఒత్తు పదాలను గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students identify and mark words containing the 'త్త' consonant cluster in various exercises.

subtopics.name: 'త్త' గుణింతం రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'త్త' consonant cluster combined with various vowel signs (gunintha).

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write the names of objects shown in pictures.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాలతో పదాలు ఏర్పరచడం
subtopics.summary: Students form and write words using letters provided in a grid.

subtopics.name: పదాలను జతపరచి వాక్యాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students match related words and then use the matched pairs to construct sentences.

subtopics.name: గేయం పూర్తి చేయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read a partial poem and complete it, possibly by adding more lines about different fruits.

subtopics.name: ఎద్దుల బండి (Bullock Cart) Poem
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem describing a bullock cart and its movement.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి (Listen - Speak)
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion by answering questions about the uses of bullock carts and other modes of transport.

subtopics.name: సొంత వాక్యాలు చదవండి. 'ద్ద' అక్షరమున్న పదాలు గుర్తించి, గీత గీయండి. (Read your own sentences. Identify and underline words with the letter 'ద్ద'.)
subtopics.summary: Students read given sentences and identify words containing the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant by underlining them.

subtopics.name: 'ద్ద' అక్షరంతో ఉన్న పదాలు కింద గీత గీయండి. (Underline words with the letter 'ద్ద'.)
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words and underline those that contain the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: సొంత పదాలు చదవండి. గీత గీసిన అక్షరాల మధ్య తేడాను చెప్పండి. (Read your own words. Tell the difference between the underlined letters.)
subtopics.summary: Students read a list of words and are prompted to differentiate between similar-sounding letters, specifically focusing on the 'ద్ద' sound.

subtopics.name: సొంత పదాలు చదవండి. వాటిలో 'ద' గుణింతపు అక్షరాలకు 'ద్ద' ఒత్తు ఉన్న పదాలు, ఇతర పదాలు వేరుచేసి పట్టికలో రాయండి. (Read your own words. Separate words with 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant from 'ద' letters and other words, and write them in the table.)
subtopics.summary: Students read a list of words and categorize them into a table based on whether they contain the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant or other letters.

subtopics.name: సొంత వాక్యాలను చదవండి. కింది ఖాళీలు 'ద్ద' ఒత్తు పదాలతో నింపండి. సరైనవి రాయండి. (Read your own sentences. Fill in the blanks with 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant words. Write the correct ones.)
subtopics.summary: Students read sentences with blanks and fill them in with appropriate words containing the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: సొంత పదాలు చదవండి. కింది పదాలు గుర్తించి రాయండి. (Read your own words. Identify and write the following words.)
subtopics.summary: Students read and practice writing words that contain the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: సొంత పదాలు చదవండి. జతపరచి రాయండి. (Read your own words. Match and write.)
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words and practice writing them.

subtopics.name: కింది గుణింతాన్ని చదవండి. కింది 'ద్ద' ఒత్తు చేర్చి రాయండి. (Read the following vowel sign. Add the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant and write.)
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant combined with different vowel signs in a provided grid.

subtopics.name: కింది బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి. (Write the names of the following pictures.)
subtopics.summary: Students identify the objects shown in pictures and write their names.

subtopics.name: కింది పదాలు ఉపాధ్యాయునితో ఎంతగా రాయండి. (Write the following words as dictated by the teacher.)
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing words from dictation, focusing on words containing the 'ద్ద' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: ఎద్దుల బండి చిత్రానికి రంగులు వేయండి. దాని గురించి రెండు వాక్యాలు రాయండి. (Color the picture of the bullock cart. Write two sentences about it.)
subtopics.summary: Students color a picture of a bullock cart and then write two descriptive sentences about it.

subtopics.name: మబ్బులు
subtopics.summary: Students read a poem about clouds and rain, then discuss their feelings about clouds and sing rain songs.

subtopics.name: 'బ్భు' ఒత్తు పదాలు
subtopics.summary: Students identify and read words containing the 'బ్భు' vottu, distinguish them from words without it, and match words to pictures.

subtopics.name: 'బ్భు' ఒత్తు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing letters with the 'బ్భు' vottu, rewriting words by adding the vottu, forming words from given letters, and constructing sentences.

subtopics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
subtopics.summary: Students engage in a creative activity involving drawing and making paper boats.

subtopics.name: భలేబొమ్మ భలేబొమ్మ
subtopics.summary: Students read a poem about a beautiful doll, describing its features.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion about the types of dolls they play with and the dolls they have drawn.

subtopics.name: పదాలను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read words and identify their presence in a given text (likely the poem from the previous page), then underline them.

subtopics.name: అక్షరాల మధ్య తేడాను గుర్తించండి
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words and identify the difference between the underlined letters, focusing on vowel length or consonant clusters.

subtopics.name: ‘మ్మ’ ఒత్తు ఉన్న అక్షరాలకు ‘O’ చుట్టండి
subtopics.summary: Students read words and circle the letters that contain the 'మ్మ' consonant cluster.

subtopics.name: ఖాళీలను పూరించండి
subtopics.summary: Students fill in the blanks in sentences with appropriate words from a given list.

subtopics.name: ‘మ్మ’ ఒత్తు చేర్చి గుణింతాన్ని రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students read the basic 'మ' gunintha and then write the 'మ్మ' gunintha in a provided grid.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మలకు పేర్లు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students identify and write the names of objects shown in pictures.

subtopics.name: గళ్ళలోని అక్షరాలతో పదాలు ఏర్పరచండి
subtopics.summary: Students form words using the letters provided in a grid and write them down.

subtopics.name: పదాలతో వాక్యాలు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students write sentences using given words.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మకు రంగులు వేయండి, పేరు రాయండి
subtopics.summary: Students color a given picture and write its name.

subtopics.name: బియ్యం కథ పఠనం
subtopics.summary: Students read a short story about the process of cooking rice, focusing on words containing the 'య్య' conjunct.

subtopics.name: బియ్యం కథపై చర్చ
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion by answering questions related to the rice story and its associated activities.

subtopics.name: 'య్య' పదాల పఠనం
subtopics.summary: Students read simple words containing the 'య్య' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: 'య్య' అక్షరాన్ని గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students read words and identify/circle the 'య్య' conjunct consonant.

subtopics.name: పదాలను చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of identical words. The instruction indicates matching with pictures, but no pictures are provided for this specific sub-exercise.

subtopics.name: 'య్య' అక్షర రచన
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the 'య్య' conjunct consonant in a grid format.

subtopics.name: బొమ్మల ఆధారంగా వాక్యాలు పూర్తి చేయడం
subtopics.summary: Students complete sentences by filling in blanks, using the provided pictures as clues.

subtopics.name: గళ్ళలోని అక్షరాలతో పదాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students form and write words using letters provided in a grid.

subtopics.name: పదాలను జతపరచి వాక్యాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read pairs of words, match them to form meaningful phrases or sentences, and then write the complete expressions.

subtopics.name: అసంపూర్ణ పదాలను పూర్తి చేయడం
subtopics.summary: Students complete incomplete words or phrases by filling in the appropriate missing parts.

subtopics.name: గేయాన్ని పూర్తి చేయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read a poem and complete its verses by filling in the blanks.

subtopics.name: పిల్లం - (ల్ల) పరిచయం
subtopics.summary: Introduction to the conjunct consonant 'ల్ల' (lla) through a poem about children and their activities.

subtopics.name: పదాల గుర్తింపు మరియు పఠనం
subtopics.summary: Reading and identifying words, focusing on the 'ల్ల' sound and its presence in words.

subtopics.name: గుణింతం మరియు పదాల రచన
subtopics.summary: Writing practice for the 'ల్ల' consonant with various vowel signs and writing words based on pictures.

subtopics.name: సృజనాత్మకత
subtopics.summary: A creative activity involving coloring a picture and writing sentences.

subtopics.name: Poem and Oral Discussion
subtopics.summary: Students read a short poem featuring words with the 'వ' consonant cluster (వ ఒత్తు) and engage in an oral discussion based on its content.

subtopics.name: చదవండి (Read)
subtopics.summary: Students practice reading words and sentences, identifying and circling letters with the 'వ' consonant cluster, and matching related words.

subtopics.name: రాయండి (Write)
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing words formed by joining letters, identifying and writing 'వ' ఒత్తు words from sentences, and practicing the 'వ' gunintha (vowel sign combinations).

subtopics.name: సృజనాత్మకత (Creativity)
subtopics.summary: Students engage in drawing, word formation from a letter grid, and fill-in-the-blank exercises, reinforcing vocabulary with 'వ' ఒత్తు.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథలు చదవడం
subtopics.summary: Students read and understand different riddles.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథల జవాబులు గుర్తించడం
subtopics.summary: Students identify the answers to the riddles presented.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథలు చెప్పడం, జవాబులు చెప్పడం
subtopics.summary: Students practice orally reciting riddles and providing their answers.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథల జవాబులు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write down the answers to previously learned riddles.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథలను చిత్రాలతో జతపరచడం
subtopics.summary: Students read new riddles and match them to corresponding images.

subtopics.name: పొడుపు కథల ప్రాముఖ్యతపై రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write about the reasons for learning riddles.

subtopics.name: పదాలతో వాక్యాలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students form sentences using a given set of vocabulary words.

subtopics.name: పదాల ఆధారంగా పొడుపు కథలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students read words from a grid and write riddles for them.

subtopics.name: చిత్రాల ఆధారంగా పొడుపు కథలు రాయడం
subtopics.summary: Students write riddles inspired by given pictures.

subtopics.name: ఆవు - పులి కథ
subtopics.summary: Students read the story of a cow that promises a tiger to return after feeding its calf, and the tiger's surprise at the cow's honesty.

subtopics.name: వినండి - మాట్లాడండి, చదవండి (కథ ఆధారంగా)
subtopics.summary: Students engage in oral discussion about the story and answer comprehension questions by marking sentences as correct or incorrect.

subtopics.name: రాయండి, పదజాలం
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing sentences based on the story and identify odd words out in vocabulary groups.

subtopics.name: పదజాలం, సృజనాత్మకత
subtopics.summary: Students practice writing sentences using given words and create dialogues for the story.

subtopics.name: చదువు - ఆనందించు
subtopics.summary: Students read and enjoy a story told through a sequence of pictures and accompanying text about a monkey helping a rabbit out of a well.

exercises.text: మాట్లాడండి :- 1) ఈ గేయం దేని గురించి ఉన్నది? 2) అభినయిస్తూ పాడుతూ పాటలు పాడండి.

కింది వర్గమాలను చూడండి. అక్షరాలను చదవండి. అచ్చులు: అ ఆ ఇ ఈ ఉ ఊ ఋ ౠ ఎ ఏ ఐ ఒ ఓ ఔ అం అః. హల్లులు: క ఖ గ ఘ ఙ చ ఛ జ ఝ ఞ ట ఠ డ ఢ ణ త థ ద ధ న ప ఫ బ భ మ య ర ల వ శ ష స హ ళ క్ష ఱ.

సూచనలకు అనుగుణంగా అక్షరాలతో చూసి చదవండి. 1) వర్గమాలలోనని ఎరుపురంగు అక్షరాలను చదవండి (ప్రాణాలు). 2) నీలం రంగులో ఉన్న అక్షరాలను చదవండి (ద్విత్వాలు). 3) గులాబీ రంగు అక్షరాలను చదవండి (మహా ప్రాణాలు). 4) కింది అక్షరాల్లోని తేడాని గమనించి చదవండి. క - ఖ, చ - ఛ, ట - ఠ, త - థ, ప - ఫ, జ - ఝ, డ - ఢ, ద - ధ, బ - భ.
కింది బొమ్మలను చూడండి. ఇవి ఏ అక్షరంతో మొదలవుతున్నవి? ఆ అక్షరాన్ని రాయండి. (Images: an eye, a fly, a table/bench, a pen, a blackboard, a pot. Students are to write the initial letter for each image.)
అ) కింది బొమ్మలను చూడండి. వాటి పేర్లు చెప్పండి, చదవండి, మాట్లాడండి.
(Implicit continuation of the instruction from page 8)
అ) కింది బొమ్మలకు సరైన అక్షరంతో జతపరచండి. 1) (Image of slate) - పలక 2) (Image of necklace) - సవరం 3) (Image of whistle) - పలక 4) (Image of bird in cage) - పలక
ఆ) కింది పదాలకు చదవడం, వాటిలోని అక్షరాలను వర్గాలలో రాయండి. అలవం, అరక, గంట, ధనం, కలం, కడప, గద, ఘనం
ఇ) కింది పదాలు చదవండి. అరక, ఆట, అడగ, ఈల, దొంగ, అరటి, ఎడ, ఓడ, కంచం, అంకం, కడవ, గంప, చదరం, జంట, రూపం, రణం, రథం, వనగ, వలప, భజన, మంచం, శనగ, శంఖం, హంస
ఈ పదాలలో ఏ అక్షరం ఎక్కువసార్లు వచ్చిందో చెప్పండి.
అ) కింది బొమ్మల పేర్లు రాయండి. (Images of a fly, chariot, ring, swan, woman, lotus are shown with blank lines below for writing.)

ఆ) కింది గళ్ళలోని అక్షరాలను చదవండి. వాటితో వచ్చే పదాలను రాయండి. (A grid of letters: ద, డ, ళ, ట, ప; వ, అ, ల, బ, ధ; క, ష, ర, వ, ర; త, న, ద, ప, య; ధ, భ, అ, ం, గ is provided with blank lines for writing words.)
